name: Tencent Cloud TRTC
description: TRTC — Tencent Cloud Real-Time Communication for audio, video, and live

seo.title: Tencent Cloud TRTC — Real-time / WebSocket Infrastructure
seo.meta_description: Tencent Cloud TRTC: TRTC — Tencent Cloud Real-Time Communication for audio, video, and live

when_to_use: Real-time audio and video APIs with sub-300ms latency
Scalable group video calls for apps in China and globally
Live streaming with interactive co-host features via TRTC SDK
WeChat Mini Program video calling with Tencent infrastructure
Voice and video for games and social apps on Tencent Cloud

pros: High-scale real-time audio/video with global edges
Strong performance in China and Asia
Live, conference and interactive broadcast modes
Integrates with Tencents broader cloud stack
cons: Best value tied to Tencent Cloud usage
Docs and portal can be rough outside Chinese
Compliance questions for some Western markets
Pricing model less predictable than peers
review.verdict: Strong choice for apps with heavy China/Asia user bases; more friction for Western teams than Agora or Twilio.
review.best_for: Apps with large China/Asia audiences needing low-latency RTC
review.not_for: Western-only products wanting simple English-first DX

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metered billing scales up and down

lock_in.reason: Real-time comms SDK with some portability
